class.name: GameInputMapper
class.brief_description: Bridges a [GameInputActionMap] onto Godot's [code]InputMap[/code] each frame.
class.description: [GameInputMapper] is a [Node] that resolves a target [GameInputDevice] (either by id via [member target_device_id] or as the primary device of [member target_kind_mask]) every [code]_process[/code] frame, fetches its [GameInputReading], and walks [member action_map] calling [code]Input.action_press(action, strength)[/code] or [code]Input.action_release(action)[/code] on each press / release edge. The rest of your game can then keep using the standard [code]Input.is_action_pressed("jump")[/code] APIs without knowing GameInput exists. The mapper calls [method GameInput.poll] defensively at the start of each frame; that call is per-frame idempotent so multiple [GameInputMapper] instances in the same scene do not refresh device state more than once per frame. Action names listed in [member GameInputBinding.action] must already exist in the project's [code]InputMap[/code]. Missing actions emit a single [code]push_warning[/code] per [GameInputMapper] instance per action (debounced via an internal set) and the binding is then ignored. On [code]NOTIFICATION_EXIT_TREE[/code], any actions the mapper currently holds pressed are released so freed actions never get stuck.

method.name: get_action_map
method.description: Returns the currently assigned action map. See [member action_map].

method.name: set_action_map
method.description: Assigns a new action map. Resets the internal "previously pressed" state and the missing-action warning set so the new map gets a clean slate.

method.name: get_target_kind_mask
method.description: Returns the kind mask used when [member target_device_id] is [code]-1[/code]. See [member target_kind_mask].

method.name: set_target_kind_mask
method.description: Sets the kind mask used to pick a primary device. See [member target_kind_mask].

method.name: get_target_device_id
method.description: Returns the explicitly targeted device id, or [code]-1[/code] when targeting the primary device of [member target_kind_mask]. See [member target_device_id].

method.name: set_target_device_id
method.description: Sets a specific [GameInputDevice] id to drive. Pass [code]-1[/code] to revert to "primary device of [member target_kind_mask]". See [member target_device_id].

method.name: get_active_binding_count
method.description: Returns the number of bindings whose action is currently being held pressed by this mapper. Useful for tests and HUD-style debugging.

members.member: The [GameInputActionMap] this mapper iterates each frame. When [code]null[/code] the mapper is a no-op.

Bitfield of [enum KindFlags] values used to pick the primary device when [member target_device_id] is [code]-1[/code]. Defaults to [constant KIND_GAMEPAD]. Despite its enum, the field accepts an OR-ed combination so a mapper can be retargeted at, for example, [code]KIND_GAMEPAD | KIND_KEYBOARD[/code].

Specific [GameInputDevice] id to drive, or [code]-1[/code] (the default) to use the primary device matching [member target_kind_mask]. Use this for split-screen / per-player mapper instances by storing the id reported by [signal GameInput.device_connected].

constants.constant: Bit flag for gamepad-style devices. Mirrors [constant GameInput.DEVICE_GAMEPAD] and is the default value of [member target_kind_mask].
Bit flag for keyboard devices. Mirrors [constant GameInput.DEVICE_KEYBOARD].
Bit flag for mouse devices. Mirrors [constant GameInput.DEVICE_MOUSE].
